title: Oberoi Hotels is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Oberoi Hotels is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Oberoi Hotels! We are hiring a Guest Relations Manager for our Agra team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Oberoi Hotels:
Oberoi Hotels is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in Event Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Oberoi Hotels!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
